alert: 5xx spike on auth-gateway, login failing platform-wide
seeded_cause: A deploy shipped a config change pointing REDIS_URL at a decommissioned host; session lookups failed. Introduced by commit 99aa88bb.

deploys.commit_message: move redis config to new secrets manager path
deploys.author: auth-team

deploys.commit_message: add request-id header to access logs
deploys.author: obs-team

logs.message: ERROR redis: dial tcp redis-old.internal:6379 connect: no route to host
ERROR session: lookup failed, cache unavailable
ERROR handler: 503 POST /login — session store unreachable
WARN  circuit breaker OPEN for redis after 50 consecutive failures
ERROR 5xx rate 88% across all auth endpoints
INFO  ops: diffed config vs previous release, REDIS_URL changed to redis-old.internal
INFO  ops: rolled back to 77cc66dd, REDIS_URL restored to redis-prod.internal
INFO  auth-gateway 5xx rate back to baseline <0.1%
